form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 10th of 12 at Randwick Midway Bm72 on February 14 over 1000m, 6 len behind Mal Coupe carrying 55kg at $41. form.formComment: At the latest run 8th of 10 at Wyong Bm72 on March 18 over 1200m, slow going 7 len behind Caesar with 55.5kg at $16. Hard to beat on his best form from the low draw.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation 14th of 18 at Randwick Four Pillars November 1 over 1500m, soft track; 8 len behind Sonofdec carrying 58.5kg at $26. When resuming last campaign fourth of 12 at Wyong Bm64 August 31 over 1100m, a long neck behind Norton Road with 59.5kg at $1.80. Capable of a bold return in this easier contest.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 11 at this track Provmid Champ on March 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Mogul Monarch with 56kg at $91. Second run from a spell faded in the straight 8th of 12 at Rosehill Midway 5yo+ Bm72 on March 28 over 1300m, slow going 5.5 len behind Annie's Rose carrying 57kg at $7.50. Can bounce back in what looks a suitable assignment.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation fifth of 11 at Newcastle in the G3 Spring Stk November 15 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Green Spaces carrying 54.5kg at $6. On debut ninth of 13 at Scone Mdn September 26 over 1100m, 5 len behind Land Bank carrying 55kg at $26. Resumes after a recent trial win. Progressive filly who can sprint well fresh.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation 2nd of 7 at Wyong Cl1 on November 26 over 1100m, 0.5 len behind Columbia Blue carrying 56.5kg at $5. When resuming last campaign 4th of 7 at Canterbury 2yo F Mdn on May 28 over 1100m, on rain affected going; 2.5 len behind Gilette carrying 57kg at $13. Was runner-up in a trial at Beaumont (Newcastle) on March 24 over 1000m. Strengthened over the break and will need luck from the draw.
